claims.text: The router filters rubric-irrelevant comments in 8 of 10 synthetic reviews.
The paper reports a calibration curve over confidence buckets.
The evaluation has not been run with adversarial reviewer personas.

review_layers.text: The paper ignores visual camera calibration for the review router.
evidence: Review request is outside the paper's stated research claim or scope.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Reviewer imported a requirement from a different task.
review_layers.next_action: Ignore for this loop unless the paper adds image inputs.

review_layers.text: It has not been tested with adversarial reviewer personas.
evidence: Paper says adversarial reviewer personas have not been run.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Adversarial reviewer styles may change routing behavior.
review_layers.next_action: Run the router on adversarial reviewer personas.

review_layers.text: The paper provides no calibration curve.
evidence: Paper explicitly reports a calibration curve.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Reviewer missed a reported calibration artifact.
review_layers.next_action: Do not spend the next loop on this criticism.

selected_experiment.hypothesis: Run the router on adversarial reviewer personas
selected_experiment.keep_condition: measurable improvement or direct support for the target claim
selected_experiment.discard_condition: no measurable support or new regression evidence
selected_experiment.verify: Run the router on adversarial reviewer personas.
